vita: As an esteemed Ghraxian diplomat born into the noble house of Zha'reen, I have dedicated my life to fostering peace among conflicting galactic factions. My journey began when a devastating war threatened our home planet Zhareen and its vibrant cultures.
portrait_prompt: A dignified Ghraxian emissary with translucent silver skin, reflecting the galaxy's diverse hues in his eyes. The neutral ambassador stands poised yet approachable, hands clasped gently on a diplomatic tablet as he negotiates between star systems.
